To: Alba Amanda Moscaroli <am@bespokeuniqueweddings.com>
Cc: Cinzia Beretta <cb@bespokeuniqueweddings.com>
Dear Alba,
I'm so happy to hear we'll collaborate again with your amazing team at Chantima and Dominik's wedding! 
Thank you for sending their information our way.
In our last email about the offer, we presented these two:
two photographers + assistant
coverage on July 4th (up to 4h)
wedding day coverage on July 5th (up to 12h)
coverage on July 6th (up to 3h)
800+ in-house edited photographs
private cloud gallery delivery available for 12 months plus exclusive access to our fine-art print store
The total price is 33.000€ plus 3.200€ travel expenses.
If Chanthima and Dominik would like to add two more photographers, the offer would be as follows: 
four photographers + assistant
coverage on July 4th (up to 4h)
wedding day coverage on July 5th (up to 12h)
coverage on July 6th (up to 3h)
800+ in-house edited photographs
private cloud gallery delivery available for 12 months plus exclusive access to our fine-art print store
The total price is 42.000€ plus 4.400€ travel expenses.
So, can you please let me know if they'd like to proceed with the two or four-photographer offer?
Regarding the content creation, our suggestion would be the following:
one content creator
3 Instagram reels from the wedding day
1 Instagram reel from the day before
1 Instagram reel from the day after
400+ raw videos
The total all-inclusive price is 3.000€.
Our team is currently preparing the content creation showcase. So, I'll send it to you as soon as it's ready. 
Looking forward to hearing from you!
Warmly,
Ana

two photographers + assistant

coverage on July 6th (up to 3h)
800+ in-house edited photographs
private cloud gallery delivery available for 12 months plus exclusive access to our fine-art print store
The total price is 33.000€ plus 3.200€ travel expenses.
If Chanthima and Dominik would like to add two more photographers, the offer would be as follows: 
four photographers + assistant
coverage on July 4th (up to 4h)
wedding day coverage on July 5th (up to 12h)
coverage on July 6th (up to 3h)
800+ in-house edited photographs
private cloud gallery delivery available for 12 months plus exclusive access to our fine-art print store
The total price is 42.000€ plus 4.400€ travel expenses.
So, can you please let me know if they'd like to proceed with the two or four-photographer offer?
Regarding the content creation, our suggestion would be the following:
one content creator
3 Instagram reels from the wedding day
1 Instagram reel from the day before
1 Instagram reel from the day after
400+ raw videos
The total all-inclusive price is 3.000€.
Our team is currently preparing the content creation showcase. So, I'll send it to you as soon as it's ready. 
Looking forward to hearing from you!
Warmly,
Ana

private cloud gallery delivery available for 12 months plus exclusive access to our fine-art print store

four photographers + assistant

one content creator

400+ raw videos

four photographers + assistant

one content creator
3 Instagram reels from the wedding day
1 Instagram reel from the day before

400+ raw videos
The total all-inclusive price is 3.000€.

Dear Ana, 
I hope you are well! Thank you for confirming the reception of the balance. Can we proceed with our commission invoice and could you confirm the amount for this of €4.200,00 +
VAT? 
I am sending you here attached the design document and time schedule for the events. 
Day 3 will be a simple and casual brunch at restaurant Crotto dei Platani. 
Chanthima will do her hair and make-up at the Mandarin Oriental, then she will go to Villa Pizzo with her bridesmaids and will get dressed there. 
I would like to ask you if Danilo and Sharon will go to the Mandarin to shoot the final touches of hair and make-up, or if they will go straight to Villa Pizzo. Here there will be a hair
and make-up station where they can take these shots too, unless they wish to capture the Mandarin. The hair and make- up station at Villa Pizzo will not be in the salon where the
bride and bridesmaids will get dressed, as there is a dedicated room for this on the first floor. 
Kindly let me know so I can adjust timings with the hair and make-up artist accordingly.

To: Alba Amanda Moscaroli <am@bespokeuniqueweddings.com>
Cc: Cinzia Beretta <cb@bespokeuniqueweddings.com>
Dear Alba,
Thank you for getting back to me and for sending all the details.
The design looks amazing, and our team is excited about working with you!
I confirm that the planner commission is €4.200,00. However, we initially calculated that amount without VAT. So, would it be possible to pay in cash on the first day to avoid the VAT
charge?
Regarding the wedding day flow, we suggest starting from Villa Pizzo. This would help simplify logistics and focus on creating stunning visuals in a space that reflects the wedding’s
aesthetic. However, if you or Chanthima prefer we begin at the Mandarin Oriental, we’re happy to adjust.
About the getting-ready room at Villa Pizzo, we mentioned to Chanthima the idea of adding lush floral decor in that space to elevate the visuals. She seemed to like the idea, as it
would make the photos feel more elevated and cohesive, which we believe will also reflect beautifully in your planning portfolio. We also discussed the option of having a mannequin
for the dress. Could you kindly check in with her to see if she’d still like to go ahead with that?
4/4/26, 3:01 PM

Dear Ana, 
I hope you are well! Thank you for confirming the reception of the balance. Can we proceed with our commission invoice and could you confirm the amount for this of €4.200,00 +
VAT? 
I am sending you here attached the design document and time schedule for the events. 
Day 3 will be a simple and casual brunch at restaurant Crotto dei Platani. 
Chanthima will do her hair and make-up at the Mandarin Oriental, then she will go to Villa Pizzo with her bridesmaids and will get dressed there. 
I would like to ask you if Danilo and Sharon will go to the Mandarin to shoot the final touches of hair and make-up, or if they will go straight to Villa Pizzo. Here there will be a hair
and make-up station where they can take these shots too, unless they wish to capture the Mandarin. The hair and make- up station at Villa Pizzo will not be in the salon where the
bride and bridesmaids will get dressed, as there is a dedicated room for this on the first floor. 
Kindly let me know so I can adjust timings with the hair and make-up artist accordingly. 
I also wanted to check if the team will be independent with their own car. There is very limited parking at Villa Pizzo, but we can reserve one car parking for you, if required. 
I also wanted to ask if during the last call you spoke about the first look and whether Chanthima confirmed if she wants to do this when Dominik arrives at Villa Pizzo. 
Looking forward to your feedback and let me know if you have any questions. 
I am also sending you here attached the regulations of Villa Pizzo and also specifically of the bridal room (where the hair and make-up touch ups will be done) to kindly read. 
Thank you 
Alba

On Sat, Jun 21, 2025 at 12:29 PM Danilo and Sharon | Studio <hello@daniloandsharon.com> wrote:
Dear Alba,
Thank you for getting back to me and for sending all the details.
The design looks amazing, and our team is excited about working with you!
I confirm that the planner commission is €4.200,00. However, we initially calculated that amount without VAT. So, would it be possible to pay in cash on the first day to avoid the
VAT charge?
Regarding the wedding day flow, we suggest starting from Villa Pizzo. This would help simplify logistics and focus on creating stunning visuals in a space that reflects the
wedding’s aesthetic. However, if you or Chanthima prefer we begin at the Mandarin Oriental, we’re happy to adjust.
About the getting-ready room at Villa Pizzo, we mentioned to Chanthima the idea of adding lush floral decor in that space to elevate the visuals. She seemed to like the idea, as it
would make the photos feel more elevated and cohesive, which we believe will also reflect beautifully in your planning portfolio. We also discussed the option of having a
mannequin for the dress. Could you kindly check in with her to see if she’d still like to go ahead with that?
We've sent you notes from our call with Chanthima, and she just mentioned that Dominik will come later and that they would like to have a session. So, please check with her
about the timing of the first look.
Lastly, our team will have a car, so it'd be amazing if we could have a parking spot. Thank you!
Please don't hesitate to let me know if there are any other questions I can help with.
Warmly,
Ana
Follow us on Instagram: @daniloandsharon
FaceTime & Whatsapp: +381 60 30 73 337
www.daniloandsharon.com

459/721

Dear Ana, 
I hope you are well! Thank you for confirming the reception of the balance. Can we proceed with our commission invoice and could you confirm the amount for this of €4.200,00
+ VAT? 
I am sending you here attached the design document and time schedule for the events. 
Day 3 will be a simple and casual brunch at restaurant Crotto dei Platani. 
Chanthima will do her hair and make-up at the Mandarin Oriental, then she will go to Villa Pizzo with her bridesmaids and will get dressed there. 
I would like to ask you if Danilo and Sharon will go to the Mandarin to shoot the final touches of hair and make-up, or if they will go straight to Villa Pizzo. Here there will be a
hair and make-up station where they can take these shots too, unless they wish to capture the Mandarin. The hair and make- up station at Villa Pizzo will not be in the salon
where the bride and bridesmaids will get dressed, as there is a dedicated room for this on the first floor. 
Kindly let me know so I can adjust timings with the hair and make-up artist accordingly. 
I also wanted to check if the team will be independent with their own car. There is very limited parking at Villa Pizzo, but we can reserve one car parking for you, if required. 
I also wanted to ask if during the last call you spoke about the first look and whether Chanthima confirmed if she wants to do this when Dominik arrives at Villa Pizzo. 
Looking forward to your feedback and let me know if you have any questions. 
I am also sending you here attached the regulations of Villa Pizzo and also specifically of the bridal room (where the hair and make-up touch ups will be done) to kindly read. 
Thank you 
Alba

Dear Alba,

The design looks amazing, and our team is excited about working with you!
I confirm that the planner commission is €4.200,00. However, we initially calculated that amount without VAT. So, would it be possible to pay in cash on the first day to avoid
the VAT charge?
Regarding the wedding day flow, we suggest starting from Villa Pizzo. This would help simplify logistics and focus on creating stunning visuals in a space that reflects the
wedding’s aesthetic. However, if you or Chanthima prefer we begin at the Mandarin Oriental, we’re happy to adjust.
About the getting-ready room at Villa Pizzo, we mentioned to Chanthima the idea of adding lush floral decor in that space to elevate the visuals. She seemed to like the idea,
as it would make the photos feel more elevated and cohesive, which we believe will also reflect beautifully in your planning portfolio. We also discussed the option of having
a mannequin for the dress. Could you kindly check in with her to see if she’d still like to go ahead with that?
We've sent you notes from our call with Chanthima, and she just mentioned that Dominik will come later and that they would like to have a session. So, please check with
her about the timing of the first look.
Lastly, our team will have a car, so it'd be amazing if we could have a parking spot. Thank you!
Please don't hesitate to let me know if there are any other questions I can help with.
Warmly,
Ana

the VAT charge?

wedding’s aesthetic. However, if you or Chanthima prefer we begin at the Mandarin Oriental, we’re happy to adjust.
About the getting-ready room at Villa Pizzo, we mentioned to Chanthima the idea of adding lush floral decor in that space to elevate the visuals. She seemed to like the idea,
as it would make the photos feel more elevated and cohesive, which we believe will also reflect beautifully in your planning portfolio. We also discussed the option of having
a mannequin for the dress. Could you kindly check in with her to see if she’d still like to go ahead with that?

her about the timing of the first look.

required.
